[Pick Up Recruitment Preview]

A new Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 11/29 (Tue)!
Target Pick-Up Student: 3★ Iroha

Pick-Up Recruitment Period: 11/29 (Tue) After Maintenance – 12/13 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
